dataset: OrientDB DemoDB - Real hotel names with synthetic coordinates
case_id: Hotels table with 3 specific hotel records

pi_items.source: https://latitude.to/articles-by-country/us/united-states/3204/plaza-hotel - GPS coordinates of Plaza Hotel showing Latitude: 40.7647
https://mapcarta.com/W477239070 and web search results - Four Seasons Sydney location data shows latitude -33.86168
https://mapcarta.com/W477239070 and web search results - Four Seasons Sydney location data shows longitude 151.20766
Task setup script (setup_task.sh) - embedded value used in SQL updates and verifier logic

privileged_info_summary: The task coordinates for three famous hotels (The Plaza Hotel, Park Hyatt Tokyo, Four Seasons Sydney) are embedded in setup_task.sh and used to test database repair operations. Real-world GPS coordinates from authoritative sources differ from the metadata values: Plaza Hotel latitude is 40.7647 (not 40.7645), longitude is -73.9746 (not -73.9744); Park Hyatt Tokyo latitude is 35.685680 (not 35.6858), longitude is 139.690994 (verified as 139.6909); Four Seasons Sydney latitude is -33.86168 (not -33.8611), longitude is 151.20766 (not 151.2112). The required batch identifier 'geo_swap_2026q1' is a synthetic tag for this audit exercise.
